flags.title: Save the Shave UGC Bill — Kill Breach Day 7
flags.problem: MTD spend $284.69, ROAS 0.70 — 7 consecutive days below 1.0 threshold. ~$153.80 burned since first flag Jul 9.
flags.solution: Kill or revise immediately — every day costs ~$28.45 at current burn rate.
flags.action: In Meta Ads Manager → Campaigns → 'Save the Shave UGC Bill _UGC_070326' → Pause campaign. Or reply 'revise' with new creative direction.

briefs.one_liner: A dog owner finds a mat just before bed — no groomer available, one product at hand.
briefs.trigger: $75-kill breach replacement — Save the Shave UGC Bill MTD ROAS 0.70, $284.69 spend (Jul 1–14)
briefs.audience: Doodle owners 25–54, dog grooming / pet health interest
briefs.hook: CU: fingers part fur revealing a tight mat near ear — evening home light. Spoken: 'It's almost ten. And there's a mat.'
briefs.test_variable: Hook + concept vs. Save the Shave UGC Bill baseline

briefs.one_liner: Kathy narrator, RESCUE scenario — tests whether voice/tone is driving ROAS decay vs. audience saturation.
briefs.trigger: FATIGUE FLAG — MTD ROAS Day 5 decay: 0.84→0.79→0.75→0.71→0.70
briefs.audience: Doodle owners 25–54, same segment as failing campaign
briefs.hook: Wide: doodle mid-brush, coat held back. Kathy VO: 'She almost got the shave.' Text: 'Almost.'
briefs.test_variable: Narrator voice/tone (Kathy VO vs. UGC creator Bill)

briefs.one_liner: We cut the price in half on the only bottle that actually finishes the job.
briefs.trigger: URGENT directive from @josh — Jul 15, 2026 · 50% off confidence-hook · 4-in-1 Shampoo (B0FQL16GH4)
briefs.audience: Warm + retargeting · Doodle and long-coat dog owners 25–54
briefs.hook: Dog post-bath, damp coat not-quite-right · owner reaches for one bottle. Kathy (amused): 'Most bath days end the same way.' Text: 'Not anymore.'
briefs.test_variable: Confidence-hook / late offer reveal — first 4-in-1 paid brief, no baseline

posts.title: Blaze v1.1 URGENT bypass close-out
posts.text: URGENT bypass complete. 1 directive processed. 1 brief staged (bath-day-bet). Slicker liquidation compliance fix applied. TikTok no connector — Meta Reels only.
